task: graph representation learning (pre-training for downstream tasks)
input: attributed graph (nodes with features and edges)
output: node embeddings (for downstream tasks like node classification, link prediction)
backbone: GNN (e.g., GAT, GCN) with generative pre-training
loss: generative pre-training loss (attribute generation + edge generation)
key_idea: pre-train a GNN by jointly generating node attributes and edges in a self-supervised manner
